query: SELECT * FROM locations; SELECT locationId, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(labourCost AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as totalLabour, MIN(saleDate) as minDate, MAX(saleDate) as maxDate FROM dailySales GROUP BY locationId;
